---
title: "cheatsheet_list"
output: html_document
---

1. [Posit Cheatsheets](https://posit.co/resources/cheatsheets/)

    a. [Tidyverse cheatsheets from Posit](https://r-graph-gallery.com/cheatsheets)

2. [RStudio Cheatsheet](https://rstudio.github.io/cheatsheets/html/rstudio-ide.html)

3. [tidyverse cheatsheet for beginners](https://www.datacamp.com/cheat-sheet/tidyverse-cheat-sheet-for-beginners)

4. [ggplot cheatsheet](https://rstudio.github.io/cheatsheets/html/data-visualization.html)
